overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a suburban sidewalk during a heavy rainstorm at night, rendered in a video game engine (resembling GTA V). The camera moves steadily forward past streetlights, palm trees, and residential properties while vehicle headlights pass on the adjacent wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential sidewalk with street frontage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk, passing a yellow fire hydrant and approaching a real estate sign

entered.detail: red brick pillar with black metal fence attached, marking property boundary
yellow fire hydrant situated on grass verge between sidewalk and road
tall cast iron street lamp post with glowing light fixture
wooden real estate sign with red text reading 'FOR SALE' and foreclosure information
tall palm tree trunk with textured bark lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy suburban night with the camera walking along a wet concrete sidewalk. A brick pillar and fence line the right side while a yellow fire hydrant sits on the left grass verge. The camera passes the hydrant and approaches a prominent red 'For Sale' sign posted near a residential property with illuminated windows. Streetlights cast pools of warm light on the glistening pavement as sparse traffic passes on the multi-lane road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential property frontage with utility area

events.description: slight shift in perspective as camera passes the trash bins and continues along the retaining wall

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past residential trash bins and a white retaining wall, maintaining steady pace in the rain

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving along the wet road in the distance

entered.detail: black wheeled garbage bins lined up on the sidewalk near the property entrance
low white concrete wall running parallel to the sidewalk, bordering the property
circular metal manhole cover set into the concrete sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking past the real estate sign and approaches a set of black trash bins lined up against a white retaining wall on the right. The rain continues to fall steadily, creating reflections on the sidewalk surface. After passing the bins, the view opens up to show more of the residential street ahead, with distant streetlights and building lights visible through the rain and palm trees. A car passes by on the left, its headlights cutting through the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rain-slicked suburban sidewalk that transitions from a close-up view of residential markers to a wider perspective of the dark, illuminated street. It begins by passing a yellow fire hydrant on a grassy verge and a brick pillar, moving steadily toward a red For Sale sign positioned before a house with glowing windows. As the camera advances past the sign, the view shifts toward a row of black trash bins lined up against a white retaining wall, with steady rain creating shimmering reflections on the concrete. The scene then opens up to reveal a longer stretch of the residential road, where palm trees and distant building lights emerge through the downpour. Finally, the camera continues forward as a passing car's headlights cut through the darkness on the adjacent multi-lane road.
